ApiVersionParameter.description: API version to be used with the HTTP request.
ApiVersionParameter.name: api-version

ResourceGroupNameParameter.description: Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
ResourceGroupNameParameter.name: resourceGroupName

SubscriptionIdParameter.description: Unique identifier of the Azure subscription. This is a GUID-formatted string (e.g. 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000).
SubscriptionIdParameter.name: subscriptionId

Authorization.description: Authorization info used to access a resource (like code repository).

parameters.description: Authorization parameters corresponding to the authorization type.

BootstrapConfiguration.description: Configuration used to bootstrap a Pipeline.

repository.description: Repository containing the source code for the pipeline.

template.description: Template used to bootstrap the pipeline.

CloudError.description: An error response from the Pipelines Resource Provider.

error.description: Details of the error from the Pipelines Resource Provider.

CloudErrorBody.description: An error response from the Pipelines Resource Provider.

code.description: An identifier for the error. Codes are invariant and are intended to be consumed programmatically.

details.description: A list of additional details about the error.

message.description: A message describing the error, intended to be suitable for display in a user interface.

target.description: The target of the particular error. For example, the name of the property in error or the method where the error occurred.

CodeRepository.description: Repository containing the source code for a pipeline.

authorization.description: Authorization info to access the code repository.

defaultBranch.description: Default branch used to configure Continuous Integration (CI) in the pipeline.

id.description: Unique immutable identifier of the code repository.

InputDescriptor.description: Representation of a pipeline template input parameter.

possibleValues.description: List of possible values for the input parameter.

type.description: Data type of the value of the input parameter.

InputValue.description: Representation of a pipeline template input parameter value.

displayValue.description: Description of the input parameter value.

isDataAction.description: Indicates whether the operation applies to data-plane.

provider.description: Friendly name of the resource provider.

resource.description: Friendly name of the resource type the operation applies to.

OperationListResult.description: Result of a request to list all operations supported by Microsoft.DevOps resource provider.

nextLink.description: The URL to get the next set of operations, if there are any.

value.description: List of operations supported by Microsoft.DevOps resource provider.

OrganizationReference.description: Reference to an Azure DevOps Organization.

id.description: Unique immutable identifier for the Azure DevOps Organization.

name.description: Name of the Azure DevOps Organization.

Pipeline.description: Azure DevOps Pipeline used to configure Continuous Integration (CI) & Continuous Delivery (CD) for Azure resources.

PipelineListResult.description: Result of a request to list all Azure Pipelines under a given scope.

nextLink.description: URL to get the next set of Pipelines, if there are any.

bootstrapConfiguration.description: Configuration used to bootstrap the Pipeline.

organization.description: Reference to the Azure DevOps Organization containing the Pipeline.

pipelineId.description: Unique identifier of the Azure Pipeline within the Azure DevOps Project.

project.description: Reference to the Azure DevOps Project containing the Pipeline.

PipelineTemplate.description: Template used to bootstrap the pipeline.

parameters.description: Dictionary of input parameters used in the pipeline template.

id.description: Unique identifier of the pipeline template.

description.description: Description of the pipeline enabled by the template.

id.description: Unique identifier of the pipeline template.

inputs.description: List of input parameters required by the template to create a pipeline.

PipelineTemplateDefinitionListResult.description: Result of a request to list all pipeline template definitions.

nextLink.description: The URL to get the next set of pipeline template definitions, if there are any.

PipelineUpdateParameters.description: Request payload used to update an existing Azure Pipeline.

tags.description: Dictionary of key-value pairs to be set as tags on the Azure Pipeline. This will overwrite any existing tags.

ProjectReference.description: Reference to an Azure DevOps Project.

id.description: Unique immutable identifier of the Azure DevOps Project.

name.description: Name of the Azure DevOps Project.
